zh.lifeSummary: 當Cacht Ní Morda於大約1090年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林時，她的父親Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne29歲，母親Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide26歲。她於1113年與Murcertac O Toole在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德洛結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1149年在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cacht Ní Morda于大约1090年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林时，她的父亲Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne29岁，母亲Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide26岁。她于1113年与Murcertac O Toole在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德洛结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1149年在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ní
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Pei-Lin, Kong, Min, Ming, Yung, Bin, Cao, Huang, Jing, Wen, Zhen, Biao, Chang, Chi, Quan, Yaping.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 倪, meaning ‘boundary’ or ‘infants’ in ancient Chinese: adopted in order to escape from a feud in place of the Chinese surname 郳, which is also pronounced Ni. The original surname was from Ni (郳), the name of an ancient state, also called Little Zhu (located in Shandong province), granted to the son of Duke Wu of Zhu (ruler of the state of Zhu, died 796  BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 賴, see   Lai   1.

variants.name: Lai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ching, Kwok, Ming, Wing, Wai, Wen, Chi, Chun, Ho, Kam, Man, Yee.  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Tuan, Hoa, Ky, Lan, Thang, Tien, Trang, Tu, Yen, Anh.

Chinese: Mandarin or Cantonese form of the surname 賴, meaning ‘depend on’ in Chinese: from Lai (賴), the name of a state (located in Henan province), which was annexed by the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 來, meaning ‘to come’ in Chinese: (i) simplified form of the placename Lai (郲), the name of a fief (located in Henan province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) adopted in place of the Chinese surname Lai (萊) which originated from the name of a fief/state. After its annihilation by the state of Qi, people simplified the name as 萊 in order to escape from political persecutions.

variants.name: Ny
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or soldier's name from ny ‘new’. It may sometimes derive from a placename beginning with Ny-.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 倪 (see   Ni  ) or 聶 (see   Nie   2).

nameMeanings.name: Morda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Jaime, Roberto, Adriana, Alberto, Alejandro, Alfonso, Augusto, Cesar, Elba, Elena.  French Andre, Arnaud, Jean-Paul, Monique.
Spanish: topographic name from borda ‘farmstead, hut, mountain shelter’.
French (southern): dialect variant of   Borde  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Borde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Marcel.  Indian Arvind, Madhusudan, Shekhar, Sushama.

French: topographic name from Old French borde ‘hut, smallholding, small farm’ (from Frankish bord ‘plank’, later denoting a plank-built cottage), a term which came to be used as a designation for a tenant farmer. It may also be a habitational name from any of the places called Borde(s). Compare Laborde and Borda .
German: variant of   Bord   4.

variants.name: Bordas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Csaba, Attila, Lajos.  Spanish Ernesto, Jaime, Juan, Juana, Lino, Pedro, Ricardo, Vicenta.
Spanish: habitational name from any of the places called Las Bordas (Lleida) or Bordas de Legarrea and Bordas de Mutuerrega (both in Navarre), plural of   Borda  .
Hungarian (Bordás): metonymic occupational name for a maker of looms or a weaver, from (takács)borda, denoting part of a loom.

variants.name: Bordes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Francois, Pierre, Anselme, Cyrille, Germaine, Guylaine, Lucien, Magalie, Marcel, Marie Yolene, Michel, Rolande.
French: habitational name from (Les) Bordes, the name of several places in various parts of France.
Catalan: plural form of   Borda  .

nameMeanings.name: Cacht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from an ancient Germanic personal name formed with macht ‘might, power’ as the first element.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name or nickname from German Macht ‘power’.

en.lifeSummary: When Cacht Ní Morda was born about 1090, in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland, her father, Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne, was 29 and her mother, Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide, was 26. She married Murcertac O Toole in 1113, in Lough, County Wexford, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1149, in Kildare, County Kildare, Ireland, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cacht Ní Morda est née environ 1090, à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande, son père, Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Murcertac O Toole en 1113, à Lough, County Wexford, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1149, à Kildare, County Kildare, Irlande, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cacht Ní Morda um 1090 in Diocese of Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne 29 und ihre Mutter Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide 26. Sie hat 1113 in Lough, County Wexford, Irland Murcertac O Toole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1149 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Kildare, County Kildare, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cacht Ní Morda è nata il circa 1090 nel Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, sua padre, Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Murcertac O Toole nel 1113, nel Lough, County Wexford, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1149, nel Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cacht Ní Mordaが約1090年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンで生まれた時，父Donal O'Mordha O'Byrneは29歳，母Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaideは26歳であった。1113年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードロウでMurcertac O Tooleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1149年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルダアで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cacht Ní Morda(이)가 대략 1090년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1113년 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 루그h에서 Murcertac O Toole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1149년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1090–about 1149: tany ho any amin'ny 1090–tany ho any amin'ny 1149

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cacht Ní Morda nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Murcertac O Toole em 1113, em Lough, County Wexford, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1149, em Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cacht Ní Morda родилась около 1090 г. в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Murcertac O Toole в 1113 г. в местности лоую, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1149 г. в местности каилдар, коунти каилдар, Ирландия в возрасте 61 год.

sm.about 1090–about 1149: e tusa o le 1090–e tusa o le 1149

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cacht Ní Morda nació aproximadamente 1090, en Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, su papá, Donal O'Mordha O'Byrne, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Gormflaith Ingen Finn O'Caellaide, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Murcertac O Toole en 1113, en Lough, County Wexford, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1149, en Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda, a la edad de 61 años.
